mentions.note: Has AI and 6G positioning; people who understand tech say buy it; Cramer relaying the smart call, not making his own deep dive.

Transformation into distributed AI infrastructure via edge computing, optical networking, and Nvidia partnership; AI/cloud segment growing 49%; already up 151% YTD and overbought—wait for pullback before adding.
Tough competitive position against larger, better-resourced rivals.
Caller scored big gains; stock hit 52-week highs with doubled market cap; Cramer sees another 30% potential—hold despite valuation compression.
